title: POC Analytics Operator
description: Custom operator for POC customer. Analyzes AI virtual agent performance, conversation topics, and inferred satisfaction. Note: Twilio automatically sets all fields as required and additionalProperties to false. Numeric ranges and formats are documented in descriptions since Twilio does not support minimum/maximum/format constraints.

ai_retained.description: Whether the AI virtual agent was able to solve the customer's issue or question without having to transfer to a human agent. true = AI resolved it, false = transferred or failed to resolve.

topic.description: The main conversation topic in a single word, in Portuguese (e.g., 'fatura', 'cancelamento', 'suporte', 'agendamento', 'reclamacao', 'informacao', 'pagamento', 'outros'). Use lowercase, no accents.

back_to_ivr.description: Whether the customer asked to return to an IVR flow or pressed 0 (or equivalent) to go back to the automated menu. true = customer went back to IVR.

asked_for_human.description: Whether the customer explicitly asked to talk to a human agent at any point during the conversation. true = customer requested a human.

inferred_csat.description: Customer satisfaction score inferred from the conversation tone, resolution, and overall experience. MUST be an integer from 1 to 5, where: 1 = very dissatisfied, 2 = dissatisfied, 3 = neutral, 4 = satisfied, 5 = very satisfied.

errors.description: Whether the AI made any mistakes during the call, including hallucinations (fabricated information), misconceptions (wrong assumptions about the customer's intent), or misunderstandings (failing to comprehend what the customer said). true = errors occurred.
